member.name: T:EasyLog.Logger
member.summary: Thread-safe daily JSON log writer for EasySave file transfer events. Log files are written to %APPDATA%\EasySave\Logs\YYYY-MM-DD.json

member.name: M:EasyLog.Logger.LogTransfer(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Logs a single file transfer event to the daily JSON log file.
member.param: Transfer duration in milliseconds. Negative value indicates an error.

member.name: M:EasyLog.Logger.ToUncFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a local path to UNC format (\\MachineName\...). If already UNC or no conversion possible, returns as-is.

member.name: T:EasyLog.LogEntry
member.summary: Represents a single log entry written to the daily log file.
